---
title: "Mary Charlotte Julia Gordon"
---

## Mary Charlotte Julia Gordon

**Dates:** (1840-1926)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i>, cousin of Swinburne

### Biography

She was later (1865) Mrs Disney Leith.  She was a  niece of Lady Elinor Wodehouse and cousin of the poet Swinburne, who is said by some to have been in love with her.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 1st 1863

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
